audit_items.proof_trace: rand.c contains no dynamic memory allocation (zero malloc/calloc/realloc/free calls confirmed by grep). All state is either static module-level globals (x[3], a[3], c at L68) or stack-local arrays inside next() (p[2], q[2], r[2]). Because no heap pointer is ever created or freed in this file, the precondition for use-after-free or double-free is never satisfied; the property holds vacuously.
